# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard
This repository is maintained as a professional engineering space.
Contributors are expected to be respectful, evidence-driven, and constructive.

## Expected Behavior
- Focus feedback on the code, data, or architecture decision.
- Assume good intent while still being technically rigorous.
- Keep discussions useful, specific, and relevant to the repository.

## Unacceptable Behavior
- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Sharing credentials, tenant data, or confidential material in issues or pull requests.
- Repeated low-signal spam or off-topic promotion.

## Enforcement
Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove content that violates this policy and may limit further participation when needed.

## Reporting
- For security-sensitive concerns, follow `SECURITY.md`.
- For conduct issues, open a maintainer-only communication path through GitHub and avoid public escalation with sensitive details.
